latestIgtvVideos.caption:

#carpetcleaning #rugrescue #cleanthatup #howto #satisfying #cleantok #fromtrashtotreasure #tiktok

latestIgtvVideos.title: Steam cleaning a greasy epoxy bar floor.
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
This floor needed some TLC! 
Our Process: ✅ Pre-treat with special degreasing cleaner. ✅ Deep scrub with a counter rotating brush machine. (CRB) Along with hand scrubbing. ✅ Steam clean with our high powered truck mount cleaning system. ✅ Enjoy a nice clean floor! 😊

latestIgtvVideos.title: Cleaning a floor the old fashioned way.
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Sometimes you just need to get on your hands and knees and scrub the floors to really make them shine. These were covered in post construction dust and needed some love.

latestPosts.caption: A little about me! 🙂 I am so grateful for each one of you following me along on this journey. I’m so excited to continue to share helpful cleaning tips with you all! #aboutme #mystory #cleanthatup

This was so satisfying to clean

Let me show you how to get your windows sparkling clean.

Welcome to the final day of the 2026 Spring Cleaning Spree. Today we are cleaning windows, window tracks, and screens the right way.

Start by cleaning the window tracks using a toothbrush or small paintbrush to loosen dirt and debris before vacuuming it out.

Then wipe the tracks down using a simple DIY vinegar cleaning mix.
For the windows, use a small amount of dish soap mixed with water along with a washer and squeegee. Start at the top of the window and work your way down to help prevent streaks.

One of the biggest tips when using a squeegee is to wipe the blade clean after every pass. This helps keep the glass streak free and sparkling clean.

For screens, scrub them gently using dish soap and water, then rinse and allow them to air dry completely before reinstalling.

Thanks so much for joining me for the Spring Cleaning Spree. And if you want to grab the checklist, I have both a free digital version and a reusable printed version available on my website.

Welcome back to the 2026 Spring Cleaning  Spree! Today we’re cleaning blinds.

Always start by dry dusting first. This removes loose dust and debris so it does not turn muddy once cleaner is applied. I like using a Swiffer or a vacuum with dusting attachments for this.

If your blinds are lightly dirty, clean them in place using my three towel system:

One towel with cleaning solution
One towel with water only to rinse
One dry microfiber towel to dry and buff

For most blinds, I use warm water with a small amount of Dawn dish soap.

Mini Vinyl Blinds:
If removable, take them down and wash them in the bathtub. Just do not submerge the top mechanism.

Wood Blinds:
 Clean in place and use Murphy Oil Soap instead.

Faux Wood Blinds:
 Can usually handle a little more moisture than real wood, but still avoid oversaturating them.

Metal, Vertical, Roller, and Most Other Blinds:
 Clean in place using the three towel system.

Fabric, Roman, and Cellular Shades:
 Always check manufacturer instructions first. Many require specialty cleaning. If allowed, spot clean only and test a hidden area first.

Plantation Shutters:
 Clean in place with a damp microfiber towel and dry immediately.

Bamboo / Woven Wood Shades:
 Use minimal moisture and focus on dusting or vacuuming when possible.

To finish, dry blinds with a clean microfiber towel.

The myth: Combo washer/dryers don’t dry well at all.

The reality: The @samsungus Bespoke AI All-In-One Vented Combo dries thoroughly. And we’ve got the test to prove it.

👀 Watch it and weep—and then dry those tears in the Combo. #SamsungPartner #GoodHousekeeping #bespokeai
